payment_terms: Annual salary of $420,000 plus performance-based bonus of $100,000 per 50 net wells producing commercial quantities of oil/gas (up to $300,000 maximum per 12-month period), plus benefits including health insurance, 401(k) contributions, eight weeks paid vacation annually, and expense reimbursement.
termination_clauses: Employee death: agreement terminates on date of death; legal representatives receive compensation through last day of month of death

Disability: Company may terminate if Employee is unable to substantially perform duties for two consecutive months or four months aggregate in any 12-month period; Company continues full salary through termination date
Conviction of crime involving Company property, fraud, or moral turpitude that significantly impacts business operations
Refusal to follow lawful Board directions within reasonable period after written notice
Gross negligence significantly impacting business operations
Material breach of Agreement not cured within 30 days of notice (or diligent pursuit of cure if not reasonably curable within 30 days)
Constructive termination: Employee may resign within 90 days of relocation demand exceeding 35 miles, material Board interference with duties, or Change of Control event
Change of Control: Employee may resign within 90 days and receive lump sum payment equal to greater of 12 months salary or remaining compensation under Agreement
